sentences.target: Ich vergesse jedes Mal meinen Schlüssel.

translations.de: Ich vergesse jedes Mal meinen Schlüssel.
translations.en: I forget my key every time.
translations.es: Siempre se me olvida la llave.
translations.fr: J'oublie ma clé à chaque fois.
translations.it: Mi dimentico la chiave ogni volta.
translations.yue: 我每次都唔記得攞鎖匙。
translations.he: אני שוכח את המפתח כל פעם.
translations.vi: Tôi lúc nào cũng quên chìa khóa.
translations.nl: Ik vergeet elke keer mijn sleutel.
translations.hi: मैं हर बार अपनी चाबी भूल जाता हूँ.
translations.pl: Za każdym razem zapominam o kluczu.
translations.el: Ξεχνάω το κλειδί μου κάθε φορά.
translations.ro: Îmi uit cheia de fiecare dată.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb (1st person singular, present indicative); transitive predicate selecting an accusative object.
Determiner (neuter accusative singular) modifying “Mal”; part of the fixed frequency NP “jedes Mal” used adverbially.
Noun (neuter); head of NP “jedes Mal”; adverbial temporal frequency adjunct.
Possessive determiner (masculine accusative singular) modifying “Schlüssel”.
Noun (masculine); direct accusative object of “vergesse”.

sentences.target: Er lacht jedes Mal über denselben Witz.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ laxt ˈjeːdəs maːl ˈyːbɐ deːnˈzɛlbn̩ vɪts/

translations.de: Er lacht jedes Mal über denselben Witz.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ laxt ˈjeːdəs maːl ˈyːbɐ deːnˈzɛlbn̩ vɪts/
translations.en: He laughs at the same joke every time.
translations.es: Siempre se ríe del mismo chiste.
translations.fr: Il rit à la même blague à chaque fois.
translations.it: Ride ogni volta alla stessa barzelletta.
translations.zh-Hans: 他每次都为同一个笑话发笑。
translations.yue: 佢每次都聽到同一個笑話就笑。
translations.ru: Он каждый раз смеётся над одной и той же шуткой.
translations.pt: Ele sempre ri da mesma piada.
translations.he: הוא צוחק מאותה בדיחה כל פעם.
translations.vi: Anh ấy lần nào cũng cười vì cùng một câu chuyện cười.
translations.ar: يضحك على نفس النكتة كل مرة.
translations.nl: Hij lacht elke keer om dezelfde grap.
translations.uk: Він щоразу сміється з того самого жарту.
translations.hu: Minden alkalommal ugyanazon a viccen nevet.
translations.hi: वह हर बार उसी मजाक पर हँसता है.
translations.pl: Za każdym razem śmieje się z tego samego żartu.
translations.el: Γελάει με το ίδιο αστείο κάθε φορά.
translations.nb: Han ler av den samme vitsen hver gang.
translations.id: Dia selalu tertawa pada lelucon yang sama.
translations.sv: Han skrattar åt samma skämt varje gång.
translations.ro: Râde de aceeași glumă de fiecare dată.
translations.da: Han griner af den samme vittighed hver gang.
translations.fi: Hän nauraa samalle vitsille joka kerta.
translations.ja: 彼は毎回同じ冗談に笑う。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject.
Finite verb (3rd person singular, present); intransitive; licenses a PP complement indicating topic.
Determiner (neuter accusative singular) with “Mal”; adverbial temporal frequency.
Noun (neuter); head of NP “jedes Mal”; adverbial frequency adjunct.
Preposition selecting accusative; introduces the PP expressing the topic of laughter.
Determiner (masculine accusative singular) modifying “Witz”; marks identity (‘the same’).
Noun (masculine); object of the preposition “über”.

sentences.target: Ich komme jedes Mal zu spät.

translations.de: Ich komme jedes Mal zu spät.
translations.fr: J'arrive en retard à chaque fois.
translations.vi: Tôi lúc nào cũng đến muộn.
translations.nl: Ik kom elke keer te laat.
translations.hi: मैं हर बार देर से पहुँचता हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg kommer for sent hver gang.
translations.sv: Jag kommer för sent varje gång.
translations.da: Jeg kommer for sent hver gang.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject.
Finite verb (1st person singular, present); intransitive; predicate is modified by an adverbial expression of manner/time.
Determiner (neuter accusative singular) with “Mal”; adverbial temporal frequency.
Noun (neuter); head of NP “jedes Mal”; frequency adjunct.
Degree adverb intensifying “spät” (‘too’).
Adverb used predicatively with “kommen”; expresses tardiness (‘late’).

sentences.target: Das klappt jedes Mal ohne Stress.

translations.de: Das klappt jedes Mal ohne Stress.
translations.en: That works every time without stress.
translations.fr: Ça marche à chaque fois sans stress.
translations.ko: 그건 매번 스트레스 없이 잘 돼.
translations.zh-Hans: 每次都能顺利搞定，没有压力。
translations.ru: Это каждый раз работает без лишнего стресса.
translations.he: זה עובד כל פעם בלי לחץ.
translations.tr: Her seferinde stres olmadan işe yarıyor.
translations.vi: Lần nào cũng hiệu quả, không căng thẳng.
translations.nl: Het werkt elke keer zonder stress.
translations.uk: Це щоразу працює без зайвого стресу.
translations.hu: Ez minden alkalommal működik, stressz nélkül.
translations.hi: यह हर बार बिना तनाव के काम करता है.
translations.pl: To działa za każdym razem bez stresu.
translations.nb: Det funker hver gang uten stress.
translations.sv: Det funkar varje gång utan stress.
translations.ro: Merge de fiecare dată fără stres.
translations.da: Det virker hver gang uden stress.
translations.fi: Se toimii joka kerta ilman stressiä.
translations.ja: 毎回ストレスなくうまくいく。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative pronoun (neuter nominative singular); subject referring to a situation/event.
Finite verb (3rd person singular, present); intransitive predicate meaning ‘work out/succeed’.
Determiner (neuter accusative singular) with “Mal”; adverbial temporal frequency.
Noun (neuter); head of NP “jedes Mal”; frequency adjunct.
Preposition selecting accusative; marks absence/privative relation.
Noun; accusative object of “ohne”.
